revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Ame-no-Koyane); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1317727960 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=Top}} }} == Translation == The English language version of this page does not appear to correlate to the Japanese equivalent. Per google translate, the Japanese version says :アメノコヤネ :The source: Free encyclopedia ' ウィキペディア (Wikipedia) ' :Jump to: Navigation and search :The アメノコヤネ (Amani house life and Amani roof life), the God which appears in the Japanese myth :There is no description concerning coming out our. The case of the rock door hiding, the celebration language was advocated before the rock door, when the アマテラス opened the rock door a little, with the フトダマ the mirror was presented. Heaven grandchild descending/disembarking overlooking occasion it assumes it attended the ニニギ, became the ancestor/founder of medium retainer ream and the like. :" The コヤネ " of name the small roof (the building) in sense, is thought thing of address of entrusting declaration God. :It was believed from the fact that it is ancestor/founder God of medium retainer ream as the Fujiwara tutelary deity which designates the medium retainer sickle foot as the ancestor/founder. In addition, are done also God of the celebration language and God of success. The Oka shrine (Osaka prefecture Higashi Osaka city , Kasuga Taisha (Nara prefecture Nara city , the Yoshida shrine (the Kyoto city Sakyo Ku , the wave the shrine (Mie prefectural Shima city) and the like it is celebrated ardently. [[User:Julian Morrison|Julian Morrison]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 02:42, 4 November 2005 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Seriously why is this little work on Japanese mythology == It’s gonna take me a while but I’m gonna look for sources on this guy as well. [[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 00:36, 17 October 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

Per google translate, the Japanese version says :アメノコヤネ :The source: Free encyclopedia ' ウィキペディア (Wikipedia) ' :Jump to: Navigation and search :The アメノコヤネ (Amani house life and Amani roof life), the God which appears in the Japanese myth :There is no description concerning coming out our. The case of the rock door hiding, the celebration language was advocated before the rock door, when the アマテラス opened the rock door a little, with the フトダマ the mirror was presented. Heaven grandchild descending/disembarking overlooking occasion it assumes it attended the ニニギ, became the ancestor/founder of medium retainer ream and the like. :" The コヤネ " of name the small roof (the building) in sense, is thought thing of address of entrusting declaration God. :It was believed from the fact that it is ancestor/founder God of medium retainer ream as the Fujiwara tutelary deity which designates the medium retainer sickle foot as the ancestor/founder. In addition, are done also God of the celebration language and God of success. The Oka shrine (Osaka prefecture Higashi Osaka city , Kasuga Taisha (Nara prefecture Nara city , the Yoshida shrine (the Kyoto city Sakyo Ku , the wave the shrine (Mie prefectural Shima city) and the like it is celebrated ardently. [[User:Julian Morrison|Julian Morrison]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 02:42, 4 November 2005 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Seriously why is this little work on Japanese mythology == It’s gonna take me a while but I’m gonna look for sources on this guy as well. Per google translate, the Japanese version says :アメノコヤネ :The source: Free encyclopedia ' ウィキペディア (Wikipedia) ' :Jump to: Navigation and search :The アメノコヤネ (Amani house life and Amani roof life), the God which appears in the Japanese myth :There is no description concerning coming out our. The case of the rock door hiding, the celebration language was advocated before the rock door, when the アマテラス opened the rock door a little, with the フトダマ the mirror was presented. Heaven grandchild descending/disembarking overlooking occasion it assumes it attended the ニニギ, became the ancestor/founder of medium retainer ream and the like. :" The コヤネ " of name the small roof (the building) in sense, is thought thing of address of entrusting declaration God. :It was believed from the fact that it is ancestor/founder God of medium retainer ream as the Fujiwara tutelary deity which designates the medium retainer sickle foot as the ancestor/founder. In addition, are done also God of the celebration language and God of success. The Oka shrine (Osaka prefecture Higashi Osaka city , Kasuga Taisha (Nara prefecture Nara city , the Yoshida shrine (the Kyoto city Sakyo Ku , the wave the shrine (Mie prefectural Shima city) and the like it is celebrated ardently. Heaven grandchild descending/disembarking overlooking occasion it assumes it attended the ニニギ, became the ancestor/founder of medium retainer ream and the like. :" The コヤネ " of name the small roof (the building) in sense, is thought thing of address of entrusting declaration God. :It was believed from the fact that it is ancestor/founder God of medium retainer ream as the Fujiwara tutelary deity which designates the medium retainer sickle foot as the ancestor/founder. revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ame-no-Koyane here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:40, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1317727960 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=Top}} }} == Translation == The English language version of this page does not appear to correlate to the Japanese equivalent. Per google translate, the Japanese version says :アメノコヤネ :The source: Free encyclopedia ' ウィキペディア (Wikipedia) ' :Jump to: Navigation and search :The アメノコヤネ (Amani house life and Amani roof life), the God which appears in the Japanese myth :There is no description concerning coming out our. The case of the rock door hiding, the celebration language was advocated before the rock door, when the アマテラス opened the rock door a little, with the フトダマ the mirror was presented. Heaven grandchild descending/disembarking overlooking occasion it assumes it attended the ニニギ, became the ancestor/founder of medium retainer ream and the like. :" The コヤネ " of name the small roof (the building) in sense, is thought thing of address of entrusting declaration God. :It was believed from the fact that it is ancestor/founder God of medium retainer ream as the Fujiwara tutelary deity which designates the medium retainer sickle foot as the ancestor/founder. In addition, are done also God of the celebration language and God of success. The Oka shrine (Osaka prefecture Higashi Osaka city , Kasuga Taisha (Nara prefecture Nara city , the Yoshida shrine (the Kyoto city Sakyo Ku , the wave the shrine (Mie prefectural Shima city) and the like it is celebrated ardently. [[User:Julian Morrison|Julian Morrison]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 02:42, 4 November 2005 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Seriously why is this little work on Japanese mythology == It’s gonna take me a while but I’m gonna look for sources on this guy as well.
